salientSummary: Canvas-based GraphCell renders commit dots + 3-segment edges for a single LayoutRow; LaneColor → SwiftUI Color mapping (dark-safe); 8 snapshot cases (md5-verified distinct, light+dark) + 3 unit tests green; full validation gate (post-skip) passes. VAL-GRAPH-004/005 via LanePalette reuse; VAL-GRAPH-008 architecturally (per-row Canvas in virtualized List, ≤20 segments per row).
whatWasImplemented: Added Sources/Design/LaneColors.swift — extension on LaneColor exposing a hand-tuned SwiftUI Color per palette slot (dark-safe purple via explicit RGB; blue/orange/green/pink/teal via system tints that render correctly in both appearances). Added Sources/Views/Graph/GraphCell.swift — pure inner View wrapping a SwiftUI Canvas with laneWidth 14pt, rowHeight 22pt, dotRadius 4pt, lineWidth 1.5pt. Draws (a) in-edges as either a straight vertical when fromColumn==toColumn or a 3-segment stub-diagonal for bends, (b) out-edges mirrored below the midline, (c) the commit dot — radius+1 when hasRef, filled with the first out-edge's color (first-parent lane color) or the commit-SHA-seeded palette color as fallback for leaf rows, (d) an accent-colored ring when isSelected. All drawing is a pure function of the value types (row, laneCount, isSelected, hasRef). No ViewModel — that's M4-graph-scroll-container's responsibility. Added Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/GraphCellUnitTests.swift — Swift Testing suite with 3 cases for columnX(0), columnX(3), and LaneColor-mapping non-clear exhaustiveness. Added Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/GraphCellSnapshotTests.swift — 8 XCTest cases: single dot / linear 3-row stack / merge inbound / branch outbound / octopus 3-parent / current-branch hasRef / selection ring / dark-mode parity. All 8 reference PNGs recorded with NSHostingController.appearance forced to .aqua or .darkAqua per AGENTS.md established pattern; all 8 md5s verified distinct (none byte-identical, including light vs dark merge). Full test suite passes: 138 Swift Testing tests + 18 XCTest tests (all three XCTest suites — BranchList 5, GraphCell 8, StatusHeader 5 — pass under skip-list). swiftformat --lint and swiftlint --strict both exit 0.
whatWasLeftUndone: M4-graph-row-meta (right-of-graph content: subject, author, age, pills) and M4-graph-scroll-container (List embedding, scroll preservation, shallow banner, commit-click → diff selection) remain as follow-up features per features.json. Instruments-based 60fps measurement deferred to M4-graph-scroll-container + post-TCC user-testing-validator as documented in the feature brief.

commandsRun.observation: 138 Swift Testing tests in 21 suites passed; 18 XCTest cases across BranchList/GraphCell/StatusHeader snapshot suites passed; TEST SUCCEEDED
8 (matches file count — all snapshots byte-distinct, including light vs dark)

interactiveChecks.action: Visually inspected each recorded PNG (SingleDotNoEdges, LinearThreeRows, MergeInbound, BranchOutbound, OctopusMerge, CurrentBranchDot, SelectionRing, MergeInbound-dark)
interactiveChecks.observed: Each case renders the expected shape: single dot with no edges; vertical stack with differently-colored dots per SHA hash; diagonal+straight in-edges converging on a dot for merge; single in-edge with two forked out-edges (straight blue + diagonal orange) for branch outbound; three converging straight in-edges for octopus; bolder dot for hasRef; accent ring visible for selection; dark background + accent-color-safe lines for dark-mode case.
